creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


secteam, please review and give an opinion as to whether this will clear the 
vulnerabilities. 

It's not clear to me why keeping 5.2 after its EOL is a feature, but if you 
guys decide it's Ok to keep it with these patches I'm not opposed. 

FYI, it's scheduled for deletion on 2011-10-14.
